title: Progressable Attributes and Abilities
description: A Minecraft mod that adds a skill/attribute system to the game to make the player more powerful, along with powerful abilities to for them to unlock!
body:
Progressable Attributes and Abilities (PA3) is all about adding a progression-oriented element to Minecraft. 

 

In pursuit of this goal, PA3 adds a system of attributes like health and strength that passively improve your gameplay. You can gather experience to level up and then allocate your attribute points to these attributes, allowing you to get benefits such as higher max health or greater dodge chances.

 

Additionally, you can use your points to unlock and level up abilities that you actively use.

 

You can have two abilities active at the same time, and can trigger them with X and V as the default keybinds.

Dash: Fling yourself around.

Arrow Salvo: Shoot so many arrows you can't physically miss.

Overshield: Absorption hearts without the Golden Apple.

Incendiary Lance: Fire a projectile with a powerful explosion.

Chain Lightning: Aim a bolt of lightning at the closest enemy, arcing to other nearby foes.

Deflective Shield: Send all projectiles fired at you in another direction.

 

But how do you access your abilities and attributes? Use the keybind K to open a menu letting you interface with both attributes and abilities.

 

Enjoy!
